item.title: Monday phone clearing dump (mostly GAMING memes)
item.description:
1. Play it with sound, obviously.
2. How gaming started
3. Bye :( Who is that, for you?
4. Who? My family what? The gemstone? Do I need it?
5. True
6. SPACE suX
7. 160 USD?
8. Looks great :/
9
10. Annoying voice aside, she IS a keeper
11. Wow, using UE5 and I'm making a weird game about a button :D
12. Damn good deal... wait?!
13. You were my brother
14. Skyrim for the first time be like
15. Thank you for making it all the way trough! As a final post I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky Stanley Parable-like game called Don't Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). Please wishlist the game on Steam, it would help immensely on my journey to fulfill my dream of making a great game that people love: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: QuicklyThisWay

item.title: Every morning and evening I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a handful of memes to say I love you. Dad jokes, morning jams, words of affirmation, bizarre memes, etc. Whatever makes them smile or feel loved. Here’s the last few days’ worth.
item.description:
I’m Batman! (Don’t tell mom).
There’s a GD birb nesting on the back yard floodlight right outside my bedroom window. Lil’ sucker wakes me up at the crack of dawn. If I have to be up, so do you.
Good morning. You are loved. Let’s go get this bread.
Time for some chorin’
Who’s your daddy?
This morning I am going to need strong coffee.
Drive safely. I love you.
Lots of darkness lately. If you’ve got some darkness, you can talk to me. Or you can try silliness.
Good morning. Wakey wakey.
Sweet dreams.
Sweet dreams. No, literally. This dream would be sweet.
One son’s SO replied with “cheese!” I replied with “Got another one!”
Replies I got were 3, 8, and 15. I replied with a photo of Mark as Cockknocker (secret #17) from Jay & Silent Bob Strike Back.
Sadly we lost one son’s SO this week. There was a break up. And thus she had to move out. I sent this so she could remember how to pack her shit into the moving van.
Coming up to the apartment (after the move out) to help you clean this weekend.
I’m the best dad ever. I never say anything cringy and I always have good advice.
I already used Cockknocker in this post so I think I contributed.
Sweet dreams. Oh, and you have a dentist appointment this week. ? ?
Why ARE you conscious. Go to sleep, fukcers!
Good morning! Here’s your morning jam.
Good morning! Here’s your morning jam (no, I don’t try to keep these in the same order on Imgur that I send them to the boys.)
Do it for Creamy.
Get up! Get some breakfast!
Breakfast time! Get up, you little ding dongs!
Dad advice.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAA
I’m a dinosaur!
Attack the day!
LOL. This is me.
Drink some water you little bastards.
Make some friends today.
As promised. Here is Gorm. Now go to bed or he’ll attack.
It’s Cowboy Carl! As advertised this morning! Say hi to Carl then go to bed.
Duplicate Creamy (but I don’t know how to edit out the duplicate so this Creamy is for any Imgurian who got this far. Love yourself today, too, just like my sons.)
Be silly today!
Today’s morning Jam.
After this week’s (ahem) events. Don’t forget to be the green flags in each other’s lives and to refuse to accept less than green flags in yours.
Or come lean on me. I love you.
Tonight’s lullaby. Sweet dreams.
I love you. I’m always here for you.
I hope you’re ok. I love you.
I bet now you’re thinking of McGonnigle’a butt hole. Sweet dreams. Good night.
It’s Friday, b!tches! Here’s your morning jam. I hope this song is in your head all day. Attack the day!
Go to sleep, dipwads. I love you.
Dad joke! Hoo ha ha.
I’m glad you’re mine. I love you. I’m proud of you. Goodnight.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Take your Monday memes heeeereee…
item.description:
Still looks like a kid, trying to be tough!
Awesome crossover!
Charles (&@$)
item.dc:creator: Mordy9

item.title: Cute animals to brighten your day number 1006 (Mixed)
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/YgLxj5d Cute Animals 1005 (Cats and Dogs) https://imgur.com/gallery/uXmcrAa Cute Animals 1004 (Mixed) https://imgur.com/gallery/KEa6lri Cute Animals 1003 (Cats and Dogs) https://imgur.com/gallery/zrDamFh Cute Animals 1002 (Mixed) https://imgur.com/gallery/rSt5eCc Cute Animals 1001 (Cats and Dogs) https://imgur.com/gallery/vBjZqvF Cute Animals 1000 (Mixed) https://imgur.com/gallery/WQ0wbcy Cute Animals 999 (Cats and Dogs)
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/please-help-me-stop-my-self-from-losing-everything
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
item.dc:creator: ryanjoseph666

item.title: I made a Trailer Kit Card for the Jeep Kit Card (3d printed)
item.description: 1:64 Print-in-place kit card. Use a pair of flush cutters to separate the parts then assemble the toy. I have included both a single color version and a multicolor version STL files available from here: https://www.printables.com/model/843852 https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6579180 https://makerworld.com/en/models/428258 Best regards Stian https://www.instagram.com/agepbiz/
item.dc:creator: agepbiz
